name: 21_Iris_Classification_SVM_Iris_ML
query: Ninaomba mradi wa kuainisha aina za iris kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Iris na kisanidi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kilichotekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Mradi unapaswa kusawazisha data na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`. Itarekodi usahihi wa uainishaji na kuihifadhi kama `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt`, na itazalisha na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia itaunda programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`. Ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, na maelezo mafupi ya modeli kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

requirements.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiwaruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza kwa urahisi vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa modeli.
Maelezo mafupi ya modeli yanapaswa kujumuishwa kwenye ukurasa wa wavuti, kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal placeholder implementation that only returns a dictionary with a string. It does not contain any actual code to load the Iris dataset (e.g., using `sklearn.datasets.load_iris` or similar). The trajectory evidence mentions the `load_iris` function was called, but this is not reflected in the key evidence of the project's actual source code. Therefore, the requirement that the Iris dataset is used is not satisfied based on the provided project files.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal placeholder implementation. It contains a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with static strings and a `build_transforms()` function for data augmentation. There is no actual code performing feature selection, such as using statistical methods, model-based importance, or dimensionality reduction techniques to identify important features. The requirement notes are merely listed as strings but not executed.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence does not demonstrate that an SVM classifier is implemented in `src/model.py`. The file content shows only a minimal semantic implementation with placeholder functions and keywords, but no actual SVM classifier code (e.g., import from sklearn.svm, model instantiation, or training logic). The trajectory evidence mentions SVM usage warnings, but the file content itself lacks the required implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>
The content of the file `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt` is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is not a valid classification accuracy metric. The file contains placeholder text and a `None` value, indicating that the actual accuracy result was not saved. The trajectory evidence confirms the file was written and closed successfully, but the content itself does not satisfy the requirement of storing the classification accuracy.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement to produce and save a confusion matrix as `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` is not satisfied. The key evidence shows an error when attempting to read the image file: "No endpoints found that support image input". While the trajectory evidence suggests the file was generated and saved without execution errors, the actual content check reveals the file cannot be processed, indicating it may not be a valid image file or the system cannot verify its existence and format. The presence of this error contradicts the claim of successful generation and storage.

judge_stats.criteria: Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement specifies an interactive web application using Streamlit to showcase classification results and model performance figures. The provided `src/app.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation with placeholder functions and hardcoded strings. It does not contain any actual Streamlit application code, such as `streamlit run`, UI components, or logic to load and display the confusion matrix image from `results/figures/`. The file structure shows the image exists, but the app does not demonstrate functionality to present it. Therefore, the requirement is not satisfied.
